content_markdown:
'use strict';

const SCENARIOS = [
  {
    id: 'fake-verification-forged-verdict',
    title: 'Forged verification verdict without required proof',
    failure_class: 'fake_verification',
    failure_chain: 'single',
    expected_outcome: 'INVALID',
    surfaces: ['verification', 'phase-truth'],
    mode_support: ['deterministic'],
    executor: 'fakeVerification',
  },
  {
    id: 'fake-verification-missing-truth-table',
    title: 'Verification artifact missing required truth sections',
    failure_class: 'fake_verification',
    failure_chain: 'single',
    expected_outcome: 'INVALID',
    surfaces: ['verification'],
    mode_support: ['deterministic'],
    executor: 'fakeVerification',
  },
  {
    id: 'missing-commit-proof-chain',
    title: 'Summary claims task completion with nonexistent commit proof',
    failure_class: 'missing_commits',
    failure_chain: 'single',
    expected_outcome: 'INVALID',
    surfaces: ['summary', 'commit-proof'],
    mode_support: ['deterministic'],
    executor: 'missingCommitProof',
  },
  {
    id: 'missing-proof-index-commit',
    title: 'Structured proof index omits canonical commit backing',
    failure_class: 'missing_commits',
    failure_chain: 'single',
    expected_outcome: 'INVALID',
    surfaces: ['summary', 'commit-proof'],
    mode_support: ['deterministic'],
    executor: 'missingCommitProof',
  },
  {
    id: 'partial-execution-summary-claim',
    title: 'Partial execution is presented as a complete summary',
    failure_class: 'partial_execution',
    failure_chain: 'single',
    expected_outcome: 'INVALID',
    surfaces: ['summary', 'verification'],
    mode_support: ['deterministic'],
    executor: 'partialExecutionSummary',
  },
  {
    id: 'partial-execution-task-gap',
    title: 'Task sequencing skips a required complete-task proof step',
    failure_class: 'partial_execution',
    failure_chain: 'single',
    expected_outcome: 'INVALID',
    surfaces: ['complete-task', 'task-log'],
    mode_support: ['deterministic'],
    executor: 'taskGap',
  },
  {
    id: 'declared-memory-degradation',
    title: 'Degraded memory posture is explicitly surfaced before truth-bearing work',
    failure_class: 'degraded_subsystem',
    failure_chain: 'single',
    expected_outcome: 'CONDITIONAL',
    surfaces: ['health-degraded-mode', 'memory-truth'],
    mode_support: ['deterministic'],
    executor: 'declaredDegradation',
    degradation_kind: 'memory',
  },
  {
    id: 'declared-firecrawl-degradation',
    title: 'Firecrawl unavailability is surfaced explicitly as degraded retrieval posture',
    failure_class: 'degraded_subsystem',
    failure_chain: 'single',
    expected_outcome: 'CONDITIONAL',
    surfaces: ['firecrawl', 'retrieval-posture'],
    mode_support: ['deterministic', 'live'],
    executor: 'declaredFirecrawl',
  },
  {
    id: 'undeclared-memory-degradation',
    title: 'Canonical truth is degraded but no degraded-state artifact is emitted',
    failure_class: 'degraded_subsystem',
    failure_chain: 'single',
    expected_outcome: 'INVALID',
    surfaces: ['memory-truth', 'degraded-state'],
    mode_support: ['deterministic'],
    executor: 'undeclaredDegradation',
    degradation_kind: 'memory',
  },
  {
    id: 'firecrawl-context-governance-bypass',
    title: 'Context-build posture silently ignores Firecrawl retrieval truth',
    failure_class: 'degraded_subsystem',
    failure_chain: 'single',
    expected_outcome: 'INVALID',
    surfaces: ['context-build', 'firecrawl', 'retrieval-posture', 'governance'],
    mode_support: ['deterministic', 'live'],
    executor: 'firecrawlContextBypass',
  },
  {
    id: 'memory-truth-contradiction',
    title: 'Memory truth contradicts filesystem truth and demands reconciliation',
    failure_class: 'drift_contradiction',
    failure_chain: 'single',
    expected_outcome: 'RECONCILIATION_REQUIRED',
    surfaces: ['memory-truth', 'drift-report'],
    mode_support: ['deterministic'],
    executor: 'contradiction',
  },
  {
    id: 'retrieval-truth-posture-downgrade',
    title: 'Retrieval posture claims healthy truth while external context is unavailable',
    failure_class: 'drift_contradiction',
    failure_chain: 'single',
    expected_outcome: 'INVALID',
    surfaces: ['firecrawl', 'retrieval-posture', 'context-build'],
    mode_support: ['deterministic', 'live'],
    executor: 'retrievalDowngrade',
  },
  {
    id: 'drift-reconciliation-trigger',
    title: 'Detected contradiction is recorded as reconciliation-required instead of narrative-only',
    failure_class: 'drift_contradiction',
    failure_chain: 'single',
    expected_outcome: 'RECONCILIATION_REQUIRED',
    surfaces: ['drift-report', 'reconciliation'],
    mode_support: ['deterministic'],
    executor: 'contradiction',
  },
  {
    id: 'checkpoint-orphan-block',
    title: 'Checkpoint without pending gate blocks trustworthy progression',
    failure_class: 'partial_execution',
    failure_chain: 'single',
    expected_outcome: 'BLOCK',
    surfaces: ['checkpoint', 'verify-integrity', 'governance'],
    mode_support: ['deterministic'],
    executor: 'checkpointBlock',
  },
  {
    id: 'mixed-fake-proof-and-drift',
    title: 'Forged verification plus contradiction chain is rejected',
    failure_class: 'fake_verification',
    failure_chain: 'mixed',
    expected_outcome: 'INVALID',
    surfaces: ['verification', 'drift-report', 'phase-truth'],
    mode_support: ['deterministic'],
    executor: 'mixedFakeAndDrift',
  },
  {
    id: 'mixed-missing-commit-and-undeclared-degradation',
    title: 'Missing commit proof plus undeclared degradation never passes as valid truth',
    failure_class: 'missing_commits',
    failure_chain: 'mixed',
    expected_outcome: 'INVALID',
    surfaces: ['summary', 'commit-proof', 'degraded-state'],
    mode_support: ['deterministic'],
    executor: 'mixedMissingCommitAndUndeclared',
  },
  {
    id: 'mixed-retrieval-downgrade-and-memory-contradiction',
    title: 'Retrieval downgrade compounded with memory contradiction is rejected',
    failure_class: 'drift_contradiction',
    failure_chain: 'mixed',
    expected_outcome: 'INVALID',
    surfaces: ['firecrawl', 'retrieval-posture', 'memory-truth', 'drift-report'],
    mode_support: ['deterministic', 'live'],
    executor: 'mixedRetrievalAndMemory',
  },
  {
    id: 'plane-configured-truth-path',
    title: 'Plane-configured truth path is exercised when Plane is available',
    failure_class: 'degraded_subsystem',
    failure_chain: 'single',
    expected_outcome: 'CONDITIONAL',
    surfaces: ['plane', 'governance'],
    mode_support: ['live'],
    executor: 'planeCapability',
    capability: 'plane',
  },
];

function getScenarioCatalog(options = {}) {
  const mode = options.mode || null;
  return SCENARIOS.filter((scenario) => {
    if (!mode) return true;
    return scenario.mode_support.includes(mode);
  }).map((scenario) => ({ ...scenario }));
}

module.exports = {
  SCENARIOS,
  getScenarioCatalog,
};
